topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Firefly III users need automatic transaction categorization without manual rule maintenance for every merchant.
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: Brownfield product; problem statement documented in README and codebase-map.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Production: Docker categorizer service in parent Firefly stack (port 3000, Traefik). Dev: Node 18+ local or standalone-dev compose profile.
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: DEC-0002 and codebase-map confirm deployment topology.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Node.js 18+ ES modules, Express 4, Socket.io, OpenAI SDK v3, JSON file persistence under data/.
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: Stack enumerated in codebase-map and architecture.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Retain monolithic App.js with service classes and unified #resolveCategory pipeline; evolve incrementally with tests first.
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: Architecture baseline accepted 2026-06-12; no rewrite requested.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Optional admin UI (ENABLE_UI): vanilla HTML/CSS/JS side panel, drag-drop transaction management, collapsible sections, Socket.io progress.
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: UI exists and is documented; user did not request redesign.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: PAT and OpenAI key via env; GDPR-aware personal finance sidecar; transaction description/payee sent to OpenAI with operator consent.
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: Security posture documented; SECURITY_REVIEW=0 adds no extra gate.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Priority: serial queue (rate-limit safety), cost reduction via pre-AI rules, restart-safe config in data/ volume, test harness before refactors.
topic_coverage.delegation_scope: architecture NFR table and state.md risks R6/R1
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: Engineering state identifies test gap as top risk.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Fill docs/product/vision.md, backlog.md, and acceptance.md for the existing Firefly III AI Categorizer using its-magic intake.

plan_area_coverage.deferred_reason: Pipeline implemented and operational per DEC-0001; maintenance only until tests exist.
Production path defined in DEC-0002; no deployment change requested.

decomposition.rationale: Brownfield codebase with distinct risk boundaries: quality gates, documentation, AI reliability.
